candidates.why: Best match for core interest expense on debt/borrowings.

candidates.row_label: Financial cost right of use assets

candidates.row_label: Interest expense, interest rate derivatives measured at fair value
candidates.why: Contains fair value derivative effects, which should be excluded.

candidates.why: Duplicates the lease-finance-cost line already present in the main statement.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost rows and excluded total financial expenses and fair-value derivative interest to avoid double counting and non-recurring valuation effects.
